name: @op-omega/plugin-flywheel-kernel
description: The flywheel math — R(t+1) coupling equation, 4-condition criticality check, bifurcation B(C) engine, and Monte Carlo inference with 5 canonical strategies (RETENTION_FIRST, BALANCED, ACQUISITION_HEAVY, NARRATIVE_LED, CAPITAL_EFFICIENT). Operator Ω's core IP per OPΩ-SPEC §5.4.
